core_mechanism: reduction of a nonlinear-hydrodynamic field to a Korteweg-de Vries-type evolution equation (with a modified-KdV variant at the symmetric point), in which the balance between nonlinear wave steepening and weak dispersion supports soliton solutions and governs the dispersive resolution of an initial step discontinuity
brief_reason: The abstract derives nonlinear hydrodynamic equations that reduce to a KdV (and modified KdV) equation and uses them to study soliton formation and the decay of a density step, which is precisely the KdV nonlinearity-versus-dispersion balance.
